title: AI Green Skill — machine-readable manifest
description: Optional manifest that mirrors the metadata of a SKILL.md so tools can consume the catalog without parsing markdown. The SKILL.md remains the source of truth for humans and AI agents; this manifest is opt-in.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier. MUST match the folder name under skills/.

name.description: Short human title; SHOULD match the H1 of SKILL.md.

description.description: One-sentence summary; SHOULD mirror the 'Description' header of SKILL.md.

version.description: Semantic version. MUST be bumped on any breaking change to Instructions or Output Format.

last_updated.description: ISO date of the last change; SHOULD match SKILL.md 'Last updated'.

capabilities.description: Invocation modes this skill is authored for: 'generation' (AI writes new green code), 'analysis' (AI explains existing code violations), 'refactor' (AI transforms existing code). A skill MAY declare several modes; the SKILL.md prose covers all of them.

languages.description: Programming languages this skill applies to, lowercase (java, python, javascript, sql, php, csharp, rust, html, ...). Omit or leave empty when the skill is language-agnostic.

agent_targets.description: Free-form list of intended agent runtimes (e.g. 'copilot', 'cursor', 'claude', 'chatgpt', 'codex'). Informational; not enforced.

gci_refs.description: Optional links to creedengo-rules-specifications rule IDs. RECOMMENDED for skills that cover a specific rule, so external tools (rule engines, IDEs, MCP servers) can bind a deterministic violation to this skill without parsing markdown.

rgesn_refs.description: Optional links to RGESN criteria IDs (e.g. 'ALG-1.1').

severity.description: Indicative severity when this skill flags an issue. Skills with capability='generation' only MAY omit this.

triggers.description: Hints for programmatic consumers. Each entry is one of: rule_match (creedengo ID), keyword (substring), ast_query (engine-specific), file_glob.

sources.description: Authoritative references mirrored from SKILL.md 'Source of Truth' table.

license.description: SPDX identifier (e.g. 'Apache-2.0'). Defaults to the repository license when omitted.

extensions.description: Free-form extension area for downstream consumers. Validators MUST ignore unknown keys here.
